CommunityApplications.Profile:
Optimisarr is a safe media-library optimiser that transcodes your movies and TV to reclaim space — and **never deletes or replaces an original until the converted file has passed explicit verification gates**, keeping the untouched original in quarantine for rollback. It supports CPU, Intel QSV/VA-API, and NVIDIA NVENC hardware transcoding and fits alongside a Sonarr/Radarr media stack.
This repository provides the Unraid Community Applications template for the Docker image (`ghcr.io/jellman86/optimisarr`).
**Support:** open an issue at https://github.com/Jellman86/optimisarr/issues
